ground_truth:
App: **Jan** (v0.8.2). **Three columns**: left nav sidebar + middle settings-category column (e.g. Appearance/Assistants-style entries) + right settings content. Top-right corner has the macOS traffic-light dots **plus extra icons** (download/grid/split-view). Provider-list entries carry **colored per-provider icons**.
- **Left nav**: window-control dots; items `New Chat` `⌘N`, `New Projects` `⌘P`, `Search` `⌘K`, `Hub`, `Settings` (active) — **keyboard shortcuts ARE shown** next to these items. Sections `Chats` (recent: "Build a PacMan Clone…", "Translate the following…", "interpreter"), `INTEGRATIONS` (`Experimental` tag, `MCP Servers`, `Claude Code`), `MODEL PROVIDERS` (`+` add; `LOCAL`: `Llama.cpp`, `MLX`; `REMOTE`: `OpenAI`, `Azure`, `Anthropic`, `OpenRouter`, `Mistral`, `Groq` (last fully-visible entry), `x.AI` (last entry, **truncated** — only the top ~40% visible; models often render it "xAI")).
- **Right (Settings)**: sections `General` (`App Version` `v0.8.2`; `Automatic Update Check` toggle **on** + button `Check for Updates` **enabled**; `Language` dropdown `English`), `Data Folder` (`App Data` path `/Users/frederic/Library/Application Support/Jan/data` + `Change Location`; `App Logs` + `Show in Finder` / `Open Logs`), `Advanced` (`Jan CLI` at `/Users/frederic/.local/bin/jan` + `Uninstall`; `Reset To Factory Settings` + red `Reset` button).

# Overall Layout

*   **Three-Column Layout:** The UI is structured into three main vertical panels: a primary navigation sidebar (left), a secondary settings navigation sidebar (middle), and the main content area (right).
*   **Context:** The current view is the application's "Settings" panel.

# Visible Components

*   **Left Navigation Panel:**
    *   New Chat
    *   New Projects
    *   Search
    *   Hub
    *   Settings
    *   Chats
    *   Build a PacMan Clone...
    *   Translate the following...
    *   interpreter
*   **Middle Settings Navigation Panel:**
    *   Settings (Header)
    *   General
    *   Appearance
    *   Assistants
    *   Attachments
    *   Local API Server
    *   HTTPS Proxy
    *   Shortcuts
    *   Hardware

    *   MCP Servers
    *   Claude Code

    *   LOCAL (Header)
    *   Llama.cpp
    *   MLX
    *   REMOTE (Header)
    *   OpenAI
    *   Azure
    *   Anthropic
    *   OpenRouter
    *   Mistral
    *   Groq
    *   xAI
*   **Right Content Panel:**
    *   General (Header)
    *   App Version
    *   Automatic Update Check
    *   Check for Updates
    *   Language
    *   App Data
    *   App Logs
    *   Advanced (Header)
    *   Jan CLI
    *   Reset To Factory Settings

# Feedback, Status, or Error Messages

*   **App Version:** v0.8.2
*   **Automatic Update Check:** Automatically check for updates on startup and periodically.
*   **Check for Updates:** Check if a newer version of Jan is available.
*   **App Data:** Location for messages, downloaded models and other data.
*   **App Logs:** View detailed logs of the App.
*   **Jan CLI:** Installed at /Users/frederic/.local/bin/jan — use jan from your terminal to serve models.
*   **Reset To Factory Settings:** Restore application to its initial state, erasing all models and chat history. This action is irreversible and recommended only if the application is corrupted.

# Interactive Elements and State

*   **Navigation Links:** All items in the left and middle panels (e.g., New Chat, General, OpenAI, Llama.cpp) are interactive links/buttons.
*   **Toggle Switch:** Automatic Update Check (State: Off/Disabled).
*   **Dropdown/Selector:** Language (State: English).
*   **Button:** Check for Updates (State: Active/Clickable).
*   **Button:** Change Location (State: Active/Clickable).
*   **Button:** Show in Finder (State: Active/Clickable).
*   **Button:** Open Logs (State: Active/Clickable).
*   **Button:** Uninstall (State: Active/Clickable).
*   **Button:** Reset (State: Active/Clickable).
*   **Selected Tab:** Settings (State: Active/Selected).

# Overall Layout
*   **Sidebar:** A vertical navigation panel on the left, containing primary application links and settings/model provider lists.
*   **Main Content Area:** The primary panel on the right, dedicated to displaying the "Settings" configuration options.

*   App Data location: `/Users/frederic/Library/Application Support/Jan/data`
*   App Logs: View detailed logs of the App.
*   Automatic check for updates on startup and periodically.
*   Restore application to its initial state, erasing all models and chat history. This action is irreversible and recommended only if the application is corrupted.

# Interactive Elements and State
*   **Toggle Switch:** Automatic Update Check (Switch is visible/toggleable).
*   **Button:** Check for Updates (Primary action button).
*   **Dropdown/Selector:** Language (Currently set to English).
*   **Button:** Change Location (App Data path).
*   **Button:** Show in Finder (App Logs).
*   **Button:** Open Logs (App Logs).
*   **Button:** Uninstall (Jan CLI).
*   **Button:** Reset (Reset To Factory Settings).
